scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.generate: node scripts/generate/generate-backend.mjs && node scripts/generate/generate-openapi-client.mjs && node scripts/generate/generate-frontend.mjs && node scripts/generate/generate-tests.mjs && node scripts/generate/generate-seeds.mjs
scripts.validate: bash scripts/validate/run-typecheck.sh && bash scripts/validate/run-pytests.sh && bash scripts/validate/run-playwright-clone.sh
scripts.package: bash scripts/package/build-api-image.sh && bash scripts/package/build-web-image.sh && bash scripts/package/build-electron.sh
